description: Trees can be cut into logs, which can be crafted into planks and used to build workshops.
Planks are crafted from logs at a Carpenter Workshop and used to make furniture and containers.
Stone is mined from rock walls and used to build workshops and construct buildings.
Ore can be smelted into metal bars at a Smelter.
Buckets and barrels are crafted from planks and needed to build some workshops.
Barrels are crafted from planks and used to store liquids and build workshops.
